title: Ruication Jigsaw Puzzle Board Folding Tilting Puzzle Table Wooden Jigsaw Board Non-Slip Mat Surface for 1000 pieces 4 Sliding Drawers Storage System For Adults Kids Children Boy Girl Gift
features: Size: 76cm x 55cm x 4cm (29.9 x 21.6 x 1.6 inches). Internal working size: 74 x 53cm. (29 x 20.8 inches). Suitable for 1000pcs puzzles. You can play puzzle on bed, floor and table. It can easily be moved from room to room and slid under a sofa when not in use. The Jigsaw Board is perfect for playing puzzles, board games, and poker.

Premium material made of premium pinewood and medium density fiberboard and leaving you no worry about the table being easily damaged. Made from premium wood for long term use. Wooden fence to prevent puzzle fall out. Use it again and again for all of your puzzles in progress.

Built-in Stand - 5 angle adjustments are available. You can always adjust the puzzle table to your favorite and avoid stiff neck and sore back. Always enjoy your puzzle fun with no pressure. When you're not using the table, your legs can fold up and place under the bed or sofa.

Massive sorting space: 4 drawers+1 big non-slip felt work surface. People can sort similar color puzzle in 5 area. They either are for storing the unsorted puzzles, or independently serve as extra sorting trays, creating a more organized and enjoyable puzzle-solving experience.

The Jigsaw Puzzle Table are practical, easy to use. Perfect choice for anyone looking for a reliable and practical puzzle table. This is a must have for professional puzzle lovers. It's the perfect solution for moving a jigsaw puzzle that is being worked on and can also be used for playing board games and poker, adding more enjoyable and fun for the entire family.
